generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control Systems (BCS) that collect real-time operational data from physical assets and transmit it to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from physical assets collected by BCS sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) that receive control signals from the Digital Twin to adjust physical building operations."
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, NonVisualHealthService, BuildingPerformanceSimulationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for IoT data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, NonVisualHealthService, BuildingPerformanceSimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingPerformanceSimulationService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, NonVisualHealthService, BuildingPerformanceSimulationService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with device metadata (sensors, actuators, controllers) and middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto, providing semantically rich geometric, spatial, and functional data for digital representation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering, BIMTools
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceSimulationInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of building operations for monitoring"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects"
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building performance optimization"
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization for facility management"
]

instance LivingLabBuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure exemplified by a Living Lab case study"
    base:contains BCSSensor, BCSActuator, BIMModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin are transmitted to physical actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling bidirectional communication for real-time adjustments to building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital twins, with data exchange and processing occurring continuously to support live operational decisions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated framework integrating BIM as semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, with roles for Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers to manage deployment, monitoring, and service extension."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, refurbishment, and adaptation, as supported by Building Information Modeling (BIM) throughout the asset's lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness; addresses semantic drift through synchronization techniques to maintain alignment between digital models and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for bidirectional real-time data exchange between physical assets and digital twins, supporting standardized IoT communication and device management."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and standardized integration frameworks to ensure interoperability across heterogeneous systems and workflows in the AECO domain."
]
